parsed.availability_comment: No current IPL-unavailability report found; he was playing for South Africa in March 2026 after a January injury scare.
parsed.availability_note: Recent 2026 international appearances indicate he is fit and active heading into IPL 2026.
parsed.followup_reason: Need early-match XI confirmation because DC's overseas combination, especially pace-bowling balance, is still not publicly settled.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Ngidi competes mainly with Starc/Chameera/Jamieson for overseas pace slots.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Heavy overseas-slot pressure remains; DC can field only four overseas players and already have Stubbs, Miller, Starc, Duckett, Nissanka, Chameera and Jamieson in the squad.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Available pace option, but not a clear first-choice overseas lock in DC's current balance.
